title: Bernie Sanders & Ro Khanna Have Grave Concerns About AI
description:
Bernie Sanders and Ro Khanna told an audience in Palo Alto last week that the rush to expand AI may have unexpected consequences.

The post Bernie Sanders & Ro Khanna Have Grave Concerns About AI appeared first on CleanTechnica.
